Savings Provision, , , provided that:Pub. L. 94–455, title XIX, § 1951(b)(12)(B)90 Stat. 1840Oct. 4, 1976“Notwithstanding subparagraph (A) [repealing this section], if amounts received in a taxable year beginning after , would have been subject to the provisions of section 1347 if received in a taxable year beginning before such date, the tax imposed by section 1 attributable to such receipt shall be computed as if section 1347 had not been repealed.”December 31, 1976
